member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Protocol.SnapshotSentryUpdateState
member.summary: Lightweight sentry update for delta compression. Contains only frequently-changing fields.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.SnapshotSentryUpdateState.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Single,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Lightweight sentry update for delta compression. Contains only frequently-changing fields.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodec.Serialize(OpenGarrison.Protocol.IProtocolMessage)
member.summary: Serialize a protocol message with optional compression. Uses default compression settings (compression enabled for snapshots).

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodec.Serialize(OpenGarrison.Protocol.IProtocolMessage,OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings)
member.summary: Serialize a protocol message with custom compression settings.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodec.TryDeserialize(System.Byte[],OpenGarrison.Protocol.IProtocolMessage@)
member.summary: Deserialize a protocol message, automatically decompressing if needed.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodec.TryDeserialize(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},OpenGarrison.Protocol.IProtocolMessage@)
member.summary: Deserialize a protocol message from a span, automatically decompressing if needed.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodecCompression
member.summary: Handles compression/decompression of protocol messages using LZ4.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodecCompression.TryCompress(System.Byte[],OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings)
member.summary: Compress data using LZ4. Returns null if compression failed or didn't save space.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodecCompression.Decompress(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decompress LZ4-compressed data.

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodecCompression.PrependEncoding(System.Byte[],OpenGarrison.Protocol.MessageEncoding)
member.summary: Prepend encoding byte to payload. Format: [encoding:1 byte][payload:N bytes]

member.name: M:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCodecCompression.ReadEncoding(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Read encoding byte and extract payload. Returns the encoding type and the payload without the encoding byte.

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings
member.summary: Configuration for protocol message compression.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings.Default
member.summary: Shared instance with compression enabled (default).

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings.Disabled
member.summary: Shared instance with compression disabled. Useful for debugging or compatibility fallback.

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings.EnableCompression
member.summary: Whether to enable LZ4 compression for messages. Default: true

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings.MinimumBytesForCompression
member.summary: Minimum message size (in bytes) before compression is attempted. Messages smaller than this are sent uncompressed. Default: 200 bytes

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings.CompressOnlySnapshots
member.summary: If true, only compress snapshot messages (most bandwidth-heavy). If false, compress all message types. Default: true (snapshots only)

member.name: P:OpenGarrison.Protocol.ProtocolCompressionSettings.UseCompressionOnlyIfSmaller
member.summary: If true, only use compressed payload if it's actually smaller than uncompressed. Default: true

member.name: T:OpenGarrison.Protocol.MessageEncoding
member.summary: Indicates the encoding format of a protocol message payload.

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Protocol.MessageEncoding.None
member.summary: No compression - raw serialized data

member.name: F:OpenGarrison.Protocol.MessageEncoding.LZ4
member.summary: LZ4 compressed data
